summary: Deployed DinoBrain Observatory v13 deterministic fossil graph design. Bumped package and installer version to 0.1.7, verified build/hook/OS/installer alignment, pushed main, added a GitHub Actions Windows release workflow, retagged v0.1.7 to the workflow commit, and confirmed the GitHub Release contains DinoBrainSetup.zip and DinoBrainSetup.zip.sha256 assets.
decisions: Use GitHub Actions with repository GITHUB_TOKEN for release asset upload so local GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN is no longer required for normal tagged releases.
Keep installer AppRef and DataRef on main for standard installs.
Exclude local screenshot attachment folder from git staging.
next_steps: Use https://github.com/clockmansy/dinobrain/releases/download/v0.1.7/DinoBrainSetup.zip as the install ZIP link.
For future releases, push main, tag vX.Y.Z, and the release workflow should build/upload assets automatically.
